alkylation reagent: treated with 10 mM Dithiothreitol (DTT) and 55 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: treated with 10 mM Dithiothreitol (DTT) and 55 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (Mass Spectrometry grade, from Promega Corp., Madison, WI, U.S.A.) overnight
fractionation method: performing subsequent purification with size exclusion chromatography (SEC)
labeling: the proteolytic activity of MMP-9Cat WT, Des1, Des2, Des3, and Des4 was measured using a fluorogenic substrate
